input.user_input: What is the auto-renewal language in this SaaS subscription agreement, and how much notice is needed to cancel?

actual: I do not see a document attached to your message. Could you please upload or provide the text of the SaaS subscription agreement? Once you share it, I will review the document and identify the auto-renewal language and the required notice period for cancellation.
